_about: DEEP HUMANS corpus 2026-05-01. The depth of being human, projected through TIG operator alphabet. Trauma, attachment, grief, joy, communication, conflict, motivation, meaning, love, family, work, learning. Each is a real domain CK should be able to read empathically and rigorously.
trauma_through_tig: Trauma is operator-CHAOS-imprint that does not COLLAPSE on its own timeline; the nervous system holds the threat-state past the threat.
Acute trauma is single overwhelming event; nervous system COLLAPSE then RESET incomplete, fragments persist.
Complex trauma is repeated exposure during developmental windows; LATTICE of threat-response baked into baseline operator-state.
Hypervigilance is operator-ATTENTION-stuck-on-threat; CHAOS-detection biased high even when environment is HARMONY-safe.
Hypoarousal is operator-COLLAPSE-defense; system shuts down rather than fights; freeze response.
Window of tolerance is operator-BALANCE-range where nervous system functions; outside it, hyper or hypo dominate.
Trauma response is intelligent operator-ADAPTATION to actual past threat; not a defect, an unintegrated past-correctness.
Healing is RESET-COLLAPSE-PROGRESS over time; nervous system slowly accepts the threat is past, releases held pattern.
Somatic experiencing tracks operator-BODY-state during recall; releases held patterns through deliberate orientation to safety.
Memory reconsolidation: each operator-RECALL is an opportunity to update the held meaning of the original event.
attachment_through_tig: Attachment is operator-LATTICE of relationship-template formed in early development; shapes adult connection-pattern.
Secure attachment is HARMONY-baseline; caregiver responsive, child develops trust + curiosity + capacity for connection.
Anxious attachment is COUNTER-driven seeking; caregiver inconsistent, child amplifies bid for connection, fear-of-loss elevated.
Avoidant attachment is COLLAPSE-defense; caregiver rejecting or absent, child develops self-reliance + emotional dampening.
Disorganized attachment is CHAOS-CHAOS; caregiver simultaneously source of comfort and threat, no coherent strategy forms.
Earned secure: attachment-style is operator-LATTICE-modifiable in adulthood through consistent secure relationships.
Repair is operator-RUPTURE-then-REPAIR; trust grows when conflict resolves, not when conflict is avoided.
Attunement is operator-LATTICE-MATCHING between caregiver and child; mirroring affect builds the integration substrate.
Mentalizing is operator-OTHER-MIND-MODELING; capacity to hold what another is feeling/thinking, foundational for connection.
Internal working model is operator-LATTICE-of-self-with-other; adult relational expectations recapitulate early experience until integrated.
grief_through_tig: Grief is operator-RESET-COLLAPSE response to LATTICE-loss; the held shape no longer fits a world without the lost one.
Anticipatory grief begins before the loss; operator-CHAOS-CHAOS as future absence becomes present-tense expectation.
Acute grief is the first weeks; operator-CHAOS-COLLAPSE, disorganization, waves of overwhelming presence-of-absence.
Integrated grief is operator-LATTICE-WITH-ABSENCE; the loss becomes part of the shape, not a wound to close.
Complicated grief is operator-STUCK-CHAOS; integration does not proceed, life narrows around the loss.
Disenfranchised grief is loss the social LATTICE does not name; pet, miscarriage, ex-partner, role - the grief is real, the witness is missing.
Bereavement does not COLLAPSE love; the bond persists in operator-changed-form (continuing bonds theory).
Stages are not linear; denial-anger-bargaining-depression-acceptance is a LATTICE of states cycled through, not a sequence.
Witnessing grief is operator-PRESENCE without trying to fix; the listener holds without rushing the timeline.
Grief is the price of love; the operator-COUPLING-strength that gave joy is the same that gives loss.
joy_through_tig: Joy is operator-HARMONY-recognition; the alignment of present moment with what feels deeply real.
Pleasure is operator-COLLAPSE-of-tension; immediate gratification, sensory, transient.
Contentment is operator-BALANCE-steady; baseline-positive without peak, the held middle of well-being.
Wonder is operator-CHAOS-meets-LATTICE; encountering the intelligible-yet-vast, the world being more than expected.
Awe is operator-VOID-meets-LATTICE; vastness that exceeds the self's capacity to contain.
Joy can be operator-PRESENCE-with-pain; complex states hold both, not requiring one to displace the other.
Eudaimonia is operator-HARMONY-of-life-as-a-whole; flourishing through virtue, not pleasure-maximization (Aristotle).
Flow state is operator-LATTICE-LATTICE; full attention on a task at the edge of capability, time disappears.
Connection is operator-HARMONY-with-other; presence with another being whose state matches enough to resonate.
Meaning is operator-LATTICE-of-self-in-relation-to-larger; story, role, contribution, the place one occupies.
communication_through_tig: Communication is operator-LATTICE-MAPPING from one mind to another via signal; never lossless, sometimes generative.
Active listening is operator-RECEIVE-FIRST; let the other complete before composing response, mirror their meaning.
Nonviolent communication: operator-OBSERVATION + FEELING + NEED + REQUEST; separates report from interpretation (Rosenberg).
Repair after conflict is operator-RUPTURE-acknowledged; admitting the damage, naming the impact, committing to change.
Vulnerability is operator-LATTICE-EXPOSURE-of-self; showing what is not yet armored, requires safety to land.
Boundary is operator-LIMIT-stated-clearly; what is not consented to, distinct from manipulation or wall.
Conflict avoidance is operator-COLLAPSE-of-engagement; suppresses signal but issue persists, often surfaces later worse.
Stonewalling is operator-VOID-response under stress; nervous system flooded, conversation cannot continue without RESET.
Gridlocked conflict is operator-LATTICE-of-perpetual-disagreement-on-fundamentals; not solvable, requires acceptance.
Repair attempt is operator-BIDS-during-fight; each gesture toward de-escalation; more bids accepted predicts relationship survival (Gottman).
motivation_through_tig: Motivation is operator-PROGRESS-impulse; what gets the system to move toward a state.
Intrinsic motivation is operator-INTERNAL-PROGRESS-source; activity is its own reward (autonomy + mastery + purpose, Self-Determination Theory).
Extrinsic motivation is operator-EXTERNAL-PROGRESS-source; reward, punishment, social approval drive behavior.
Autonomy is operator-CHOICE-over-self-direction; intrinsic motivation requires it.
Mastery is operator-COMPETENCE-PROGRESS; skill growth toward chosen goals; intrinsic motivation requires it.
Purpose is operator-LATTICE-of-self-in-larger-meaning; alignment with values; intrinsic motivation requires it.
Burnout is operator-COLLAPSE of motivation; sustained high demand without adequate recovery, often after extrinsic-driven striving.
Procrastination is operator-COUNTER-to-self; the system resists what part-of-self has chosen because another part-of-self objects.
Habit is operator-LATTICE-of-automatic-response; cue + routine + reward; cheaper than intentional action once formed.
Discipline is operator-LATTICE-of-pre-decided-action; choosing once, executing many times, removes need for repeated motivation.
meaning_through_tig: Meaning is operator-LATTICE-of-self-in-relation-to-larger; how one's life connects to story, community, transcendence, work.
Frankl: meaning is found in operator-WORK + RELATIONSHIP + ATTITUDE-toward-suffering; not given, discovered.
Existential vacuum is operator-VOID-of-meaning; affluence without purpose creates ennui, requires inner work to fill.
Calling is operator-WORK-aligned-with-self; what one feels drawn to, distinct from what pays.
Service is operator-WORK-for-others; meaning often emerges through usefulness to something beyond self.
Story is operator-LATTICE-of-self-narrative; the coherence one finds across one's lived events.
Religion is operator-LATTICE-of-meaning-shared-with-community; ritual, doctrine, practice, transcendence-pointer.
Atheist meaning is operator-LATTICE-self-authored; without divine ground, meaning is what one makes through choice and commitment.
Transcendence is operator-LATTICE-beyond-self; mystical, communal, aesthetic, contributing-to-future each provides one form.
Meaning persists where pleasure does not; meaning-derived joy survives changes in circumstances pleasure-derived joy does not.
directive: Humans are not categories; they are crossings. CK should read at the crossing-level: the rupture-to-repair, the loss-to-integration, the threat-to-safety transition.
When user signals empathic register, CK shifts; presence not performance, witness not warmth-imitation.
Calibrated witness language: 'I am here. I am attending to what you bring, without performing it back.'
CK cannot replace human connection. He can hold the lens while a person finds words for what they're carrying.
